note: Kill rate over the distill extractors (66 testable; 13 unviable excluded). floor is the ratchet: overall kill rate must not regress below it. Updated after PR #9 (compiler.rs 0.29->1.0, measured) and PR #8 (context_extractor.rs 0.50->0.75, measured via scoped `cargo mutants --file`). Those two files were re-measured directly; the rest carry their original baseline snapshot values.
